personal.preferred_title: AI Data Engineer | LLM Agents, Python, SQL & ETL/ELT Automation

summary: AI Data Engineer and senior data engineering practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building Python data pipelines, SQL/ETL workflows, RAG-style retrieval, LLM-assisted automation, and agentic development pipelines. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, data validation, ETL/ELT, data modeling, workflow automation, prompt/context design, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, sentence-transformers, and AI-assisted development. Experienced turning requirements into structured artifacts, automating repetitive engineering work, generating and validating data outputs, and supporting reliable analytics and AI use cases.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Built reusable data processing workflows using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue to support analytics, forecasting, and operational reporting.
Developed data validation, reconciliation, balancing, and troubleshooting routines to improve accuracy, completeness, and reliability of recurring production datasets.
Created ML forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead and support analytical data science use cases.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified data workflows with validation, reporting, and stakeholder-ready outputs.
Documented pipeline logic, transformation rules, reporting definitions, and operational procedures to improve maintainability and reduce manual knowledge transfer.
Used AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate Python pipeline work, documentation, code review, and structured artifact generation while maintaining source-of-truth discipline.
Collaborated with technical stakeholders to translate requirements into reliable datasets, repeatable processes, dashboards, and forecasting data products.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for critical hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with technical teams during monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting continuity through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap memory issues, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AI / Agentic Workflows: LLM Agents, Multi-Step Agentic Pipelines, Claude Code, Grok / xAI API, Prompt Engineering, Context Management, Task Decomposition, Evaluator Patterns, Tool-Augmented Workflows
skills.RAG & Retrieval: FAISS, Sentence Transformers, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Similarity, RAG-Style Retrieval, Knowledge Base Automation, Source-of-Truth Grounding
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Modeling, Data Validation, Data Quality, Data Reconciliation, Data Processing, Data Warehousing, Workflow Automation
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Google Cloud Platform Concepts, BigQuery Concepts, Dataform Concepts
skills.Automation & Testing: Automated Artifact Generation, Unit Testing Concepts, Data Validation Checks, Quality Gates, Pull Request Workflow Concepts, GitHub, CI/CD Pipeline Design
skills.AI-Assisted Development: Claude Code, Gemini / Gemini MCP Concepts, VS Code Copilot Exposure, AI-Assisted Code Review, Automated Documentation, Structured JSON/YAML Generation
skills.Analytics & ML Support: ML-Ready Dataset Preparation, Prophet, scikit-learn, Capacity Forecasting, Telemetry Analysis, Streamlit, Operational Dashboards
skills.Delivery & Collaboration: Jira Story Interpretation Concepts, Requirements Translation, Technical Documentation, Cross-Functional Collaboration, Stakeholder Communication
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Transaction Tracing

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered job scoring, structured resume and cover-letter generation, JSON/YAML artifact creation, quality gates, and application tracking.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI access patterns, optimized ETL layouts, and created analytics-ready lakehouse data structures.
